title: Elbaf’s Crisis Converges
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Luffy, Unknown person #1, Loki, Unknown person #2, Usopp, Gunko as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy and Loki confront gunko...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Heeey!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?! usOP?! Brook!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take care of them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the hell happen- Ed over there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Need a hand?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If things get worse, yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you guys better stay a little farther back!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: 'Cuz. LOKIS GONNA START WECKING EVERYTHING!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the pot calling the kettle black, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A ship from the Giants was sighted many years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and its captain was of extract- binary size...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, those who moved while hiding within the deep fog...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Targeted only World govern- went ships and struck them down...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the one who's gonna blow her away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Meanwhile, at the same time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There were reported sightings of a giant flying creature.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: She got away...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Where is she?! she's so tiny!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those rumors were being told as if they were true..'

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I see... it makes sense now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's over there!! How dare you do that to usopp...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And to Brook 2!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What?!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
